testcase.name: shouldOpenExampleDotOrg

failure.message: Element should have text "Example Domain" {body} Element: '<body></body>' Actual value: text="" Screenshot: file:/workspace/build/reports/tests/1776939600100.0.png Page source: file:/workspace/build/reports/tests/1776939600100.0.html Timeout: 4 s.
failure.type: Element should have text "Example Domain" {body} Element
